member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetWeaponModeHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the SetWeaponModeHelper for sending a SetWeaponMode
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the SetWeaponMode
to.
member.remarks: Use this message to set the character's weapon mode. This is an alternativeto the setWeaponMode public function.
